members.name: AddPreviewGenerator
members.summary: Create an own, custom preview generator.

members.name: CheckForInvalidation
members.summary: Check if the resource changed, if so, it will be invalidated and the corresponding signal emitted.

members.name: QueueEditedResourcePreview
members.signature: public void QueueEditedResourcePreview(Resource resource, Object receiver, StringName receiverFunc, Variant userdata)
members.summary: Queue the [param resource] being edited for preview. Once the preview is ready, the [param receiver]'s [param receiver_func] will be called. The [param receiver_func] must take the following four arguments: [String] path, [Texture2D] preview, [Texture2D] thumbnail_preview, [Variant] userdata. [param userdata] can be anything, and will be returned when [param receiver_func] is called. [b]Note:[/b] If it was not possible to create the preview the [param receiver_func] will still be called, but the preview will be [code]null[/code].

members.name: QueueResourcePreview
members.signature: public void QueueResourcePreview(String path, Object receiver, StringName receiverFunc, Variant userdata)
members.summary: Queue a resource file located at [param path] for preview. Once the preview is ready, the [param receiver]'s [param receiver_func] will be called. The [param receiver_func] must take the following four arguments: [String] path, [Texture2D] preview, [Texture2D] thumbnail_preview, [Variant] userdata. [param userdata] can be anything, and will be returned when [param receiver_func] is called. [b]Note:[/b] If it was not possible to create the preview the [param receiver_func] will still be called, but the preview will be [code]null[/code].

signals.name: PreviewInvalidated
signals.summary: Emitted if a preview was invalidated (changed). [param path] corresponds to the path of the preview.
